rule: Automation contract. Tests must prove the business workflow, not only render the screen.

qaScenarios.positiveTest: Create Employee Profile succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
qaScenarios.negativeTest: Create Employee Profile is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
qaScenarios.accessTest: Create Employee Profile is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
qaScenarios.validationTest: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Create Employee Profile.
qaScenarios.workflowTest: Full lifecycle test: create -> Create Employee Profile -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
qaScenarios.regressionRisk: High - core lifecycle step, breaking this blocks the whole module
